title: Anemone Flaccida and Queen of the Night
overview: Yu has a passion for accessories. His best friend is his biggest supporter. But are they really just friends?

title: The Hibiscus Hair Ornament
overview: Yu ponders his next product, and Himari forms a plan to bring Yu and Rion closer together.

title: Tulips and the Face of Love
overview: Yu grapples with the reveal of Rion as his first crush, as his relationship with Himari begins to shift.

title: Hydrangea and a New Seed
overview: Himari's decision to break off her friendship with Yu causes a rift in their relationship.

title: A Hunk and Morning Glory Yutaka
overview: Yu reconciles with Himari, but finds himself at risk of failing classes.

title: The Scent of Cherry Sage
overview: Rion is determined to participate in the study group to try to get closer to Yu.

title: The Cracked Crocus
overview: The leak of Yu's identity as the creator of You leaves him juggling an uptick in orders from schoolmates.

title: Zinnia and Where Passion Lies
overview: After his work results in troubles at school, Yu contemplates quitting his craft in accessories.

title: Love's Chocolate Cosmos
overview: Ahead of summer break, Yu admits his feelings for Himari. Meanwhile, Kureha visits to offer Yu a deal.

title: The Meaning Behind Sunflowers
overview: Yu, Himari, and Rion look for inspo for Yu's masterpiece during summer break.

title: Goodbye, Sunflower
overview: With his decision to feature sunflowers, Yu works on his masterpiece to go head to head with Kureha.

title: Flowers that Bloom Along the Path of Dreams
overview: As Yu and Himari decide to part ways for their dreams, along comes Himari's day of departure.
